Dough_Bread.description: Makes bread, just add to a fire.

Dough_Flatbread.description: Makes flatbread, just add to a fire.

DebugVikingFood.description: Meat from a recently killed animal, worth cooking first.
DebugVikingFood.flavorText: Transplanted from Earth, a range of genetically modified animals thrive in the terrazone, providing an energy-dense food source.

Deer_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Deer_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Deer.
Deer_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Debug_Target.description: Useful for crafting basic tools and weapons.
Debug_Target.flavorText: One of the oldest crafting materials known to humanity, available on Icarus thanks to the last-minute genetic redesigns of Earth-native animals, which now thrive in the terrazone.

Dehumidifier.description: Powerful, portable protection against the effects of being underground.
Dehumidifier.flavorText: Powered by charcoal, the dehumidifier heavily reduces bacterial growth in caves by reducing dampness.

Delivery_Object.description: A fragile flechette flask containing temperature-sensitive terraforming enzyme payload.
Delivery_Object.flavorText: Following the ban on terraforming, Inaris continued to secretly pursue the technology under the protection of their owner-directors, Uniao.

Deep_Mining_Drill_Electric.description: A convenient drilling device that runs on electricity.

Deep_Mining_Drill_Biofuel.description: A biofuel-powered drill capable of mining ore trapped deep under the surface.
Deep_Mining_Drill_Biofuel.flavorText: Slow progress, but it\'s worth it

DesertWolf_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

DesertWolf_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Hyena.
DesertWolf_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Drying_Rack.description: A rack for slowly drying various cuts of meat and curing leather.

Delivery_Object_Temperature.flavorText: Following the ban on terraforming, Inaris continued to secretly pursue the technology under the protection of their owner-directors, Uniao.

Digested_Enzymes.description: Partially Digested Enzymes taken from the Stomach of Icarus Wildlife.

Dynamic_Mission_Beacon.description: Displays a map marker when deployed.
Dynamic_Mission_Beacon.flavorText: Lightly mapped and largely unexplored, human markers on the surface of Icarus are few and far between. The beacon offers a BYO solution.

Dropship_Grenade_T4.description: Once thrown if the landing area is determined to be valid, will call your dropship to your current location.
Dropship_Grenade_T4.flavorText: Made on planet with the materials at hand, lets hope it works.

Dropship_Grenade_Workshop.description: Once thrown if the landing area is determined to be valid, will call your dropship to your current location.
Dropship_Grenade_Workshop.flavorText: Another amazing innovation thanks to Sinotai

Deep_Freeze.description: A freezer that preserves food but amasses ice very slowly and uses a fairly large amount of power.
Deep_Freeze.flavorText: Energy efficiency is important on EVERY planet.

Dogtags_Lure.description: A flashy lure carefully crafted out of... dogtags?
Dogtags_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Dried_Tomato.description: A snack with an intense sweet and savory flavor
Dried_Tomato.flavorText: Another great snack from your Drying Rack.

Dried_Avocado.description: A snack with a chewy texture and concentrated flavor
Dried_Avocado.flavorText: Another great snack from your Drying Rack.

Dried_Rhubarb.description: A healthy snack with a rather tart flavor.
Dried_Rhubarb.flavorText: Another great snack from your Drying Rack.

Deer_Statue_Stone.description: A graceful deer etched in stone.

Dried_Freshwater_Fillet.description: A savory snack made by drying and preserving tender fillets of freshwater fish.
Dried_Freshwater_Fillet.flavorText: Can be dried using a Drying Rack. Rather chewy.

Dried_Saltwater_Fillet.description: A flavorful snack made by drying and preserving tender fillets of saltwater fish.
Dried_Saltwater_Fillet.flavorText: Can be dried using a Drying Rack. Rather chewy.

Drac_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Drac.
Drac_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Desert_Striker_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Arid Striker.
Desert_Striker_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dreadwing_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Dreadwing.
Dreadwing_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Drac_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Desert_Striker_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Dreadwing_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Desert_Mammoth_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Desert_Deer_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Desert_Deer_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Antelope.
Desert_Deer_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Desert_Mammoth_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Columbian Mammoth.
Desert_Mammoth_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dried_Meat_Generic.description: A plain piece of dried meat

Dog_Bowl_Food.description: A simple bowl to fill with food for your dog.
Dog_Bowl_Food.flavorText: Wasn\'t this full a minute ago?

Dog_Bowl_Water.description: A simple bowl to fill with water for your dog.
Dog_Bowl_Water.flavorText: A hydrated pet is a happy pet.

Dog_Head_A1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_A1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Head_A2.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_A2.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Head_B1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_B1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Head_B2.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_B2.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Trophy_A1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_A2.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_B1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_B2.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Head_C1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_C1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Trophy_C1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dirt_Frame.description: A simple block of dirt that can serve as the foundation of a structure. Must be placed attached to the terrain.

Dirt_Ramp.description: A simple dirt ramp that can serve as basic vertical travesal. Must be placed attached to the terrain.

Dirt_Mound.description: A place to plant crops.  Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
Dirt_Mound.flavorText: Dig (RMB) with a shovel to create. Higher tier shovels create better dirt mounds.

Dirt.description: Some rich Icarus soil extracted from the ground with a shovel.

Dressing_Kit.description: Heals basic wounds, deep wounds, frostbite and heatstroke.

Dirt_Corner.description: A simple corner to help with foundation building.

Dog_Head_D1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_D1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Head_D2.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_D2.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Trophy_D1_1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_D1_2.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Accessory_D.description: An old harness fashioned into a jumpsuit for a very special dog. (A Laika dog accessory only)

Dog_Trophy_D2_1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dog_Trophy_D2_2.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Dried_Kiwifruit.description: Sliced and dried kiwifruit, good for a quick snack.

Dirt_Mound_With_Tier.description: A place to plant crops.  Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
Dirt_Mound_With_Tier.flavorText: Dig (RMB) with a shovel to create. Higher tier shovels create better dirt mounds.

Dev_Transform_Tool.description: Left click to select in-world actor to transform. Use the popup to fine-tune location, rotation, and scale

Dirt_Stack_50.description: Some rich Icarus soil extracted from the ground with a shovel.

Drill_Arrow.description: An experimental arrow which deals extra damage against Quarrites and can mine ores.
Drill_Arrow.flavorText: A motorized drill head allows it to burrow into objects when fired.

Dead_Ape.flavorText: There is always a bigger fish.

Dead_EI_Agent.description: Fallen in the line of duty.
